zh.lifeSummary: 當John Leete of Dodington於1575年5月23日出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾亨廷格頓時，他的父親Lord Thomas Leete III20歲，母親Maria Slade30歲。他於1610年與Anne Shute在英國英格蘭薩默塞特多丁頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1648年12月1日在他的家鄉享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Leete of Dodington于1575年5月23日出生在英国英格兰坎布利其爾亨廷格頓时，他的父亲Lord Thomas Leete III20岁，母亲Maria Slade30岁。他于1610年与Anne Shute在英国英格兰薩默塞特多丁頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1648年12月1日在他的家乡享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Leete
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: An early American bearer of this name was one of the founders ofGuilford, CT. William Leete (c. 1613–83), a colonial governorof New Haven colony and CT, was born at Dodington, Huntingtonshire,England. He converted to Puritanism and sailed for America to escapepersecution in May 1639.

variants.name: Leet
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a watercourse orroad junction, Old English gelǣt, or a habitational namefrom Leat in Devon, or The Leete in Essex, named with this element.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John Leete of Dodington was born on 23 May 1575, in Huntingdon, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Lord Thomas Leete III, was 20 and his mother, Maria Slade, was 30. He married Anne Shute in 1610, in Dodington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 1 December 1648, in his hometown, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Leete of Dodington est né le 23 mai 1575, à Huntingdon, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lord Thomas Leete III, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Maria Slade, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Anne Shute en 1610, à Dodington, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 1 décembre 1648, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Leete of Dodington am 23. Mai 1575 in Huntingdon, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Thomas Leete III 20 und seine Mutter Maria Slade 30. Er hat 1610 in Dodington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Anne Shute geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 1. Dezember 1648 im Alter von 73 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Leete of Dodington è nato il il 23 maggio 1575 nel Huntingdon, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Lord Thomas Leete III, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Maria Slade, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Anne Shute nel 1610, nel Dodington, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 1 dicembre 1648, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Leete of Dodingtonが1575年5月23日にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアハンティングドンで生まれた時，父Lord Thomas Leete IIIは20歳，母Maria Sladeは30歳であった。1610年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトドディントンでAnne Shuteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1648年12月1日に故郷で73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Leete of Dodington(이)가 1575년 5월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 헌틴그던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Thomas Leete III(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Maria Slade(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1610년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 도딩턴에서 Anne Shute(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1648년 12월 1일 그의 고향에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.23 May 1575–1 December 1648: 23 de maio de 1575–1 de dezembro de 1648
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Leete of Dodington nasceu em 23 de maio de 1575, em Huntingdon, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Lord Thomas Leete III, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Maria Slade, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Shute em 1610, em Dodington, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1 de dezembro de 1648, em sua cidade natal, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Leete of Dodington родился 23 мая 1575 г. в местности хантингдон, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Lord Thomas Leete III было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Maria Slade, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Shute в 1610 г. в местности додингтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 1 декабря 1648 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 73 лет.

es.23 May 1575–1 December 1648: 23 de mayo de 1575–1 de diciembre de 1648
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Leete of Dodington nació el 23 de mayo de 1575, en Huntingdon, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Lord Thomas Leete III, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Maria Slade, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Anne Shute en 1610, en Dodington, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 1 de diciembre de 1648, en su pueblo, a la edad de 73 años.
